---
title: "Code Generation and Repair Loop"
---

# Code Generation and Repair Loop

**Working seal:** `stack://code-generation-and-repair-loop/D239381DD2`

**Enter:** Use when an AI system is helping write or modify software and generation should stay tied to execution evidence.

| Step | Spell    | Artifact                                                       | Advance when                                         |
| ---- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Specify  | Precise task statement, constraints, interfaces, and non-goals | The target is testable                               |
| 2    | Draft    | Smallest plausible implementation or patch                     | The code compiles in principle and names assumptions |
| 3    | Run      | Build, test, lint, or type-check output                        | Actual failures are captured verbatim                |
| 4    | Diagnose | Likely cause and repair surface                                | The diagnosis uses only emitted evidence             |
| 5    | Repair   | Smallest diff addressing the diagnosed cause                   | The patch is explicit                                |
| 6    | Verify   | Check results and residual risk                                | Checks pass or residual risk is clearly bounded      |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "steps": [
    3,
    4,
    5,
    6
  ],
  "until": "Checks pass, error surface stabilizes without progress, or attempt budget is exhausted"
}
```


## On Fail

Escalate with spec, code diff, failing output, diagnostic notes, and unresolved assumptions.

## Why It Works

It separates invention from judgment and binds repair to execution evidence.
